outcome_record.event_name: La Liga Pre-Season 2027-28 — FC Barcelona vs Valencia

prediction.pre_match_note: Pre-season friendly. post_tournament_opener protocol applied (from recalibration-v3/v4). Low form certainty — pre-season. SMS 62. Both teams rotating squads. $BAR token: minimal signal in pre-season.

calibration_flags.notes: Pre-season: quality differential still predictive even with rotation. Barcelona > Valencia quality held even at 60% first team. Pre-season modifier ×0.85 correctly reduced confidence. Low SMS (62) but direction correct — quality gap too large for draw.
